name: OpenProject MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for OpenProject — a popular open-source project management platform (Jira/Asana alternative). Enables AI agents to create and manage work packages, track project progress, manage Scrum/Kanban boards, query project data, and interact with OpenProject workflows — supporting AI-assisted project management.
use_cases: Creating and updating work packages from project management agents
Querying project status and backlog from planning agents
Managing Scrum sprints and Kanban boards from agile coaching agents
Tracking project milestones and deliverables from executive reporting agents
not_for: Jira, Asana, Linear, or other PM platform users (OpenProject-specific)
Teams without an OpenProject instance deployed
Simple personal task management (OpenProject is enterprise PM)
best_when: An engineering team using OpenProject wants AI agents to manage work packages, track sprint progress, and automate project reporting workflows.
avoid_when: You use Jira, Linear, Asana, or other PM tools. Community tool — not official OpenProject integration. Also: OpenProject self-hosted or cloud instance required.

auth.notes: OpenProject API token required. Generate in OpenProject user settings. Configure with your OpenProject instance URL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: OpenProject Community Edition is free; Enterprise has paid plans
pricing.notes: OpenProject Community Edition is free open source. MCP server is free community tool.

known_agent_gotchas: Requires self-hosted or cloud OpenProject instance — configure instance URL in MCP settings
OpenProject API version can differ between self-hosted versions — test against your version
Community tool (AndyEverything) — not official OpenProject integration
Work package creation requires proper project and type configuration in OpenProject
agent_readiness.security_notes: OpenProject API token. HTTPS to your OpenProject instance. Self-hosted option for full data control. Project data sensitivity depends on deployment.

security_score_components.security_notes: API token auth. HTTPS. Self-hosted option for data control. GDPR-compliant OpenProject available.
